Mumbai → Marburg — Checklist
🧡
Her Heart 🧡
How are you really, Bebu?
When nervous
Nervous आहेस का? 😰
▼
Tap कर — मला माहित आहे तुला कसं वाटतंय
Bebu, don't worry ❤️

मला माहित आहे — it happens. तुला सगळं नवीन वाटेल, आणि भीती पण वाटेल. पण don't worry — मी आहे ना.

घाबरून जाऊ नकोस. तुला सगळं जमणार आहे. बस निडरपणे स्वतःला express कर — जी तू आहेस, तीच रहा.

I know you are the best. ❤️ तू IISER मधून Max Planck ला पोहोचलीस — हे काही normal नाही. तू already winner आहेस.

जेव्हा पण scared वाटेल — हे card पुन्हा उघड. मी इथेच आहे. Always. 🧡
— तुझा Rish ❤️

Recorded with love

Whenever you miss me — press play. Ha message मी तुझ्यासाठी रेकॉर्ड केला आहे. Anytime you feel alone, listen. मी आहे ना always 💛

❤️ जेव्हा भीती वाटेल तेव्हा वाच
Bebu, don't worry ❤️

I know it happens. तुला सगळं नवीन वाटेल, आणि भीती पण वाटेल — पण don't worry, मी आहे ना.

घाबरून जाऊ नकोस. तुला सगळं जमणार आहे — बस निडरपणे स्वतःला express कर. जी तू आहेस, तीच रहा.

I know you are the best. 🧡
— तुझा Rish ❤️
A note from Rish — just for you 💛
Hii Bebu, mala mahit aahe ki Frankfurt la utaralyavar aani pahilyaanda baaher padnyachi भीती खूपच जाणवेल... pan kalji nako karu, mi aahe na.

तू खूप हुशार आहेस, सगळं manage करशील — पण कधी कधी वाटणार "आता मी काय करू?" तेव्हा app उघड, आणि मला सांग. Chat मध्ये बोल, नाहीतर direct call कर.

माझं तुझ्यावर खूप प्रेम आहे. खूप miss करतो. आणि तुझ्या नव्या आयुष्यासाठी खूप शुभेच्छा! 🧡
— Your Rish 🧡

🔒 Safe Check-In (Ghari aalis ka?)
🏠 "Mi gharat safe aahe" → Rish la sang
Raatri baaher geli hotis? Ghari aalis ki ha button daab. Rish la lagech WhatsApp message jaail ❤️

Jevha udaas vaatel — he kar
💬 Rish shi bol (AI)
Ask Rish tab var ja — kay vaatatay te type kar. Rish kadhich judge karat nahi, promise.
🤝 Marburg मध्ये Indian community
Facebook वर "Indians in Marburg" search कर. Philipps-Universität मध्ये Indian students आहेत. तू इथे एकटी नाही आहेस.
🏰 Marburg Schloss la chal
Fresh हवा, आणि Schloss च्या वरून दिसणारा view — खूप बरं वाटेल. एकदम सुंदर जागा आहे. Mood fresh होईल. माझ्यासाठी एक photo काढ ❤️
🍛 Ghar sarkha kahi tari bannav
Dal-bhaat, चहा, काहीही घर-सारखं. Lidl मध्ये dal मिळतो. German ingredients वर Indian recipe हवी असेल तर Ask Rish ला विचार.
🛒
Grocery List 🛒
🛒 Aldi & Lidl are cheapest. Shop by Saturday — Sunday closed!
🇮🇳 Indian Grocery — Marburg & Online
Atta, masala, dal, curry leaves — yahaan milenge 💛 Tap any shop to open Maps.

💡 German → Indian substitutes
Plain quark = thick curd · Greek yogurt = dahi · Schmand = malai · Linsen = dal · Kichererbsen = chana · Koriander = dhaniya · Ingwer = adrak

Tasks
Best SIM cards for you
💡 Buy at Frankfurt Airport — Day 1
Get your SIM before the train to Marburg. You'll need Google Maps, WhatsApp, and translation from minute one. Aldi Talk is available at the airport.
📱 Aldi Talk
Best for studentsAt Frankfurt airport
💶 €12.99/month — 15GB data + calls + SMS
✅ No ID verification headache to activate
✅ Top-up at any Aldi store easily
✅ Good coverage across Germany including Marburg
⚠️ Buy starter kit (~€3) + a €15 top-up voucher at airport
📱 Congstar
Best network coverageTelekom backbone
💶 €10–€20/month — runs on Telekom (best in Germany)
✅ Best signal in Marburg specifically — hilly terrain needs strong network
✅ English support available online
⚠️ Buy at Saturn/MediaMarkt in Frankfurt before train
📱 O2 Free S
Sign up before flying
💶 €10/month — 10GB, unlimited texts
✅ Easy online signup with just passport — no German address needed
✅ Great for WhatsApp calls back to India
⚠️ Best to sign up before you fly — SIM delivered to German address
Quick comparison
Aldi TalkBest for Day 1 — buy at airport
CongstarBest signal in Marburg long-term
O2Best if ordered before flying
Documents checklist
🧳 Bring from India — don't forget any!
✅ Passport (original + 5 photocopies)
✅ Valid German Visa
✅ Offer/Acceptance letter from Max Planck
✅ 10th, 12th, Degree certificates + apostille
✅ Passport size photos (10 minimum)
✅ Travel + health insurance proof
✅ Bank statement (last 6 months)
✅ Blocked account proof (if applicable)
✅ Emergency contact list (printed)
🏠
Anmeldung — City Registration
Within 14 days!
1Get Wohnungsgeberbestätigung (landlord confirmation form) from your landlord — they must give this
2Book appointment at Einwohnermeldeamt (Marburg City Hall, Biegenstraße 44)
3Bring: passport + visa + landlord form + completed Anmeldeformular
4You get Meldebescheinigung — photocopy 10 times. You'll need it for EVERYTHING: bank, insurance, uni, visa
🏥
Health Insurance (Krankenkasse)
Required immediately
1For students/interns: apply to TK (Techniker Krankenkasse) — best English support in Germany
2Go to tk.de — apply online or call +49 40 69 09-0
3Cost: ~€110/month (check if Max Planck covers this — many institutes do for interns)
4They'll send you a health card (Gesundheitskarte) — needed for any doctor visit
🏦
Bank Account
1Use N26 (best for internationals) — full English app, video ID verification, no branch visit needed
2Sign up at n26.com with just passport + selfie — card arrives in 5-7 days
3DKB is alternative — also good, requires Anmeldung first
4Do Anmeldung FIRST — most banks require German address proof
🪪
Residence Permit (Aufenthaltstitel)
Before visa expires
1Book appointment at Ausländerbehörde Marburg (Foreigners Office) — do this in first week
2Bring: passport, current visa, Anmeldung, health insurance proof, offer letter, photos, bank statement
3Apply minimum 4-6 weeks before entry visa expires — appointments fill up fast
4You may get a Fiktionsbescheinigung (interim permit) while waiting — keep it safely
🚆
Transport in Marburg + Germany
✅Download DB Navigator app — for all trains in Germany
✅Marburg local buses: use RMV app or buy Tageskarte (day ticket) ~€5
✅Frankfurt from Marburg: ~€20-35 by ICE/Regional train (1.5-2h)
⚠️Always validate (stamp) regional bus/tram tickets — inspectors give heavy fines
INR ↔ EUR Converter
₹ Indian Rupees (INR)
€ —
€ Euro (EUR)
₹ —
1 EUR = ₹108 · Check Google for live rate
Cost of life in Marburg
Student room (WG)€250–€500/month
Groceries€150–€200/month
Bus pass (Marburg)€29/month
Meal at Mensa (uni)€2–€5
Eating out€8–€15
Frankfurt day trip€20–€35 train
Coffee€3–€4
Monthly total (approx)€700–€1000
Marburg-specific tip
🍽️ Eat at the Mensa!
Philipps-Universität Mensa has student meals for €2-5. Massive saving vs eating out. They usually have vegetarian options. Show student/intern ID.

Marburg Rulebook
Pune vs Marburg — cultural dos and don'ts
🛡️
Safety Guide — Marburg
Things to avoid · What to do in each situation
›
⚠️ Things to Avoid
🚶 Cycle Lanes
Red/marked paths are cycle-only — walk on them and cyclists will ring loudly. Always check before stepping.
🌙 Isolated Areas at Night
Avoid Lahnufer (riverside) alone at night, underlit alleys near Bahnhof, and the train station area after midnight.
🍺 Außenbereich at Night (Rowdy Crowds)
Marburg Oberstadt pubs can get rowdy on weekends. Don't engage with drunk groups — just walk past calmly.
📵 Sharing Location with Strangers
Never share your address or exact location on apps with someone you just met online.
🏠 Flat Scams
Never transfer deposit before physically seeing the flat. Very common scam — landlord disappears after payment.
🚌 Ticket Inspectors
Always validate your bus/tram ticket before boarding. Schwarzfahren (fare evasion) fine is €60 first offence.
✅ What To Do In Each Situation
🚨 Medical Emergency
1. Call 112 (ambulance + fire, free, 24/7)
2. Say "Ich brauche einen Krankenwagen" (I need an ambulance)
3. Give your address — Google Maps → Share Location works
4. Nearest ER: UKGM Marburg — Baldingerstraße 1
5. For non-urgent: Kassenärztlicher Bereitschaftsdienst → 116 117
👮 Harassment / Feeling Unsafe
1. Call 110 (Police) or use NORA app silently
2. Walk into any open shop, café, or restaurant — ask to stay
3. Marburg Polizeipräsidium: +49 6421 406-0
4. WhatsApp Rish immediately — I will call back within 60 seconds ❤️
5. Fake a phone call if you feel followed — loud, confident voice
💳 Lost Wallet / Phone Stolen
1. Block cards immediately — N26 / SBI app → Freeze card
2. Report theft to Police: 110 or visit Polizeipräsidium
3. German law: police must give you a report number (Aktenzeichen) — keep it
4. Lost phone → iCloud / Google Find My Device → remote lock/wipe
5. Call Rish — I'll help you sort money transfer immediately ❤️
🏥 Sick / Mental Health Crisis
1. Non-emergency GP: Marburg Uni Ambulanz → 06421 28-0
2. Mental health crisis line (24/7, free): 0800 111 0 111
3. Telehealth in English: Doctolib.de — book online
4. TK / public insurance covers most visits — show Versicherungskarte
5. Always call Rish first — we figure it out together ❤️
🏠 Flat / Landlord Problem
1. Document everything — photos + WhatsApp screenshots
2. Mieterbund Marburg (Tenants' Association): free legal advice
3. Contact Studentenwerk Marburg for emergency housing
4. Never leave flat without written notice (Kündigung) — 3 month notice standard
5. Max Planck HR dept can sometimes assist with housing emergencies
🌧️ Severe Weather / Storm
1. Check KATWARN or Nina app — official German emergency alerts
2. Marburg hills flood quickly — avoid Lahn riverside during heavy rain
3. Power cut: Stadtwerke Marburg → 06421 205-0
4. Stay indoors, WhatsApp Rish your status ❤️
🆘
Emergency? Use the SOS button
The red SOS button in the top navbar → one tap to call 112 or Rish

Marburg Rulebook 📋
Pune mein chalto... Marburg mein nahi! 🇮🇳→🇩🇪
How to read this
Left = what we do in Pune 🇮🇳  |  Right = what Germans do in Marburg 🇩🇪
Follow the RIGHT side — it matters here!
🚦
Traffic & Pedestrians
🇮🇳 Pune🇩🇪 Marburg
कुठेपण cross करतात — signal बघत नाहीत
Red man = STOP. Always wait. Police can fine you for jaywalking 🚨
Road चं left right काही नाही — dodge करतात
Walk on the RIGHT side of the pavement — always
Honk करत गाडी चालवतात — normal आहे
Honking = very rude. Germans almost never honk 🤫
Pedestrians dodge करत गाडी जाते
Cars STOP for pedestrians at crossings — you have right of way! Stand confidently.
🔇
Noise & Quiet Hours (Ruhezeit)
🇮🇳 Pune🇩🇪 Marburg
Loud music कुठेपण, केव्हाही — normal आहे
⚠️ 10 PM – 7 AM = Ruhezeit. NO loud music, NO drilling, near-silence. Neighbors WILL complain.
Sunday = market day, loud and fun!
Sunday = quiet ALL DAY. No washing machine after 10pm. No drilling on Sundays ever.
कुठेपण केव्हाही phone वर बोलतात
Lower your voice in public — phones, buses, cafes. People will stare if you're loud.
1-3 PM fun time!
1–3 PM = informal quiet time. Many neighbors nap. Avoid loud sounds.
🗑️
Recycling & Waste (VERY important)
🇮🇳 Pune🇩🇪 Marburg
एक bin — सगळं खाली
4 bins! Wrong bin = complaint from neighbors 😤
—
🟡 Gelber Sack = plastic/packaging
—
📰 Papiertonne = paper/cardboard
—
🟢 Biotonne = food waste/organic
—
⬛ Restmüll = everything else
Bottle bin मध्ये
Glass bottles → separate Glascontainer (green, brown, white glass). Pfand bottles → return to supermarket for money back! 💰
⏰
Punctuality (Germans are VERY serious)
🇮🇳 Pune🇩🇪 Marburg
"5 minute मध्ये येतो" = 20-30 minutes late reality
2 PM appointment = arrive at 1:55 PM. Being late is seen as disrespectful 😬
Late नाही झालो तरी कुणाला mind नाही
If you'll be late, call or message IMMEDIATELY. Germans plan tightly.
Train/bus = येईल तेव्हा
Germans trust train schedules. Verspätung (delay) genuinely upsets them 😂
🏪
Sunday Shopping (Most shocking rule!)
🇮🇳 Pune🇩🇪 Marburg
Sunday = best day to go out, shopping, market!
🔴 Sunday = EVERYTHING CLOSED. Aldi, Lidl, H&M, everything. Stock up Saturday!
Late night shopping normal आहे
Shops close 8-10 PM weekdays, Saturdays 6-8 PM. No 24-hour shops.
Holiday shopping time!
Public holidays = same as Sunday. Plan food in advance.
🚲
Cycling Lanes (Don't walk on them!)
🇮🇳 Pune🇩🇪 Marburg
Cyclist dodge karto pedestrians between
Red/marked path = cycling lane ONLY. Walk on it and cyclists will ring bell very loudly 🛎️
Cycle on road, footpath, kuthpan chalto
Cyclists follow traffic rules too — red light means stop. Serious business.
🏘️
Apartment & Neighbour Rules
🇮🇳 Pune🇩🇪 Marburg
Notice न देता knock करायला येतात — normal आहे
NEVER visit unannounced. Always call/message first. Germans value privacy deeply.
Loud TV, music, any time
Quiet hours 10 PM–7 AM strictly. Also 1–3 PM. Washing machine after midnight = not okay.
Package delivery = leave outside or with anyone
Package left with neighbor (Nachbar) = totally normal. Return favor when you can.
Hallway cleaning — कोणी करतं
In WG/shared buildings — hallway cleaning is ROTATED. Your turn = clean thoroughly!
💳
Cash Culture (Germany ≠ UPI paradise)
🇮🇳 Pune🇩🇪 Marburg
UPI everywhere! Cash कमी लागतं
Many restaurants, small shops = CASH ONLY. Always carry €20-30 minimum.
Online payment normal आहे
Germany loves cash historically. Even at some Aldi — card only after a limit.
Tipping — कोणी करत नाही
Tip = round up the bill or add 10%. Say "Das stimmt so" (keep the change) when paying.
🤝
Social Etiquette
🇮🇳 Pune🇩🇪 Marburg
Head nod + Hi = greeting
Firm handshake + direct eye contact. Nodding like bobblehead is not understood 😄
Queue मध्ये gap आहे — घुस!
STRICT queue culture. Never push or cut. Germans will say something, loudly.
Group pays ek person — normal
"Getrennt" = we pay separately. Germans almost always split the bill exactly.
कोणी door hold करत नाही
Hold door for the person behind you — basic etiquette everyone follows.
Personal questions = normal first meeting
Germans don't ask about salary, marriage, age casually. Keep it professional at first.
🚌
Public Transport Rules
🇮🇳 Pune🇩🇪 Marburg
Bus मध्ये conductor ticket check करतो
⚠️ VALIDATE (stamp) your ticket before boarding regional transport. Inspectors = heavy fine if not stamped.
Bus मध्ये phone वर बोलतात, music
Silence or very quiet in trains. Phone calls = outside or very quiet. Headphones aanat.
Seat मध्ये food खातात
No eating/drinking in many trains. Check signs inside.
Seat for elders — depends on mood
Give up seat for elderly, pregnant, disabled — expected, not optional.
🆘
NORA App — Germany's Official Safety App
⬇️ Frankfurt ला उतरल्यावर लगेच NORA install कर
NORA (Notruf-App) हे Germany चं official emergency app आहे. एक tap — GPS location सकट emergency services ला silent call जातो — बोलता आलं नाही तरी चालतं. App Store आणि Google Play वर free मिळतं.
India मध्ये 112 call करतात
NORA tap केल → GPS आपोआप 112 ला जातो. Location सांगायची गरज नाही!
Emergency मध्ये बोलता आलं नाही तरी
NORA मध्ये silent emergency mode आहे — बोलता आलं नाही तरी police ला तुझी location मिळते
—
Accidents, medical emergency, harassment साठी पण उपयुक्त. App Store मध्ये "NORA Notruf-App" search कर.
❤️ Rish म्हणतो: Day 1 लाच install कर. ते तुझ्याकडे आहे हे माहित झाल्यावर Rish ला बरं वाटेल. 2 मिनिटांचं काम आहे.
❤️ From Rish
या rules ची भीती नाही वाटायला हवी — फक्त Pune पेक्षा वेगळ्या आहेत. Basics पाळलीस की Germans खूपच warm असतात. 2-3 आठवड्यात जमेल तुला, promise आहे. Confuse झालीस तरी मला सांग — मी नेहमी इथे आहे. 🇩🇪❤️
🧳
Udnyapurvi
2 Days Before ✈️
Mumbai → Frankfurt · 24 Apr 2026 · 00:55 IST
✈️ TIME TO TAKEOFF
Mumbai Chhatrapati Shivaji Airport → Frankfurt
--
Days
--
Hours
--
Mins
--
Secs
🌐 Web Check-In
📱
Check-in opens: April 23, 00:55 IST
Airlines open web check-in 24hrs before departure. Do it as soon as it opens — window/aisle seats go fast! Print or save boarding pass on phone.
Step 1
Open airline website / app
Step 2
Enter PNR + last name
Step 3
Choose your seat 🪑
Step 4
Download boarding pass 📄
✅ Web check-in done! Save boarding pass on phone + take a printout ❤️
🧳 Baggage Weight Tracker
Weigh your bags at home! Airport excess baggage is EXPENSIVE 💸 Enter your bag weight below.
🎒 Cabin Bag
Limit: 7 kg
kg
🧳 Checked Bag
Limit: 23 kg
kg
💡 International flight typical limits: Cabin 7kg + Checked 23kg (1 bag). Check your e-ticket for exact allowance. Extra kg = ~₹500–₹1500 per kg!
⏰ Airport Day Plan — April 23
~8:30 PM
Leave for Mumbai airport 🚗
International = 3 hrs before. Flight 00:55 → Leave by 9:30pm latest. Earlier = safer!
~9:30 PM
Airport — Departures entrance 🏢
Terminal 2 CSIA. Carry boarding pass (phone or print). Passport ready at hand.
~9:45 PM
Check-in counter / bag drop 🧳
Even with web check-in, you'll drop your checked bag here. Have passport + ticket.
~10:15 PM
Security check + Immigration 🛂
Keep liquids in 100ml bottles in a clear zip bag. Laptop out of bag for security.
~11:00 PM
Airside — Gate area ✅
Food, duty free, relax. Boarding usually starts 45 min before. Check gate on screens!
🎒 Cabin Bag Essentials
🛂 Passport + visa
📄 Boarding pass
📋 MPI offer letter
💊 Medicines (1 week)
🎧 Earphones
🔋 Powerbank (≤100Wh)
💧 Empty water bottle
🧴 Lip balm + moisturizer
🍫 Snacks (mathri, chikki)
🧥 Light jacket / dupatta
💻 Laptop + charger
💳 Card (intl enabled)
🚫 NOT allowed in cabin: Liquids over 100ml · Scissors · Lighters · Powerbank over 100Wh
📦 Pack Karayachya Goshti
📋 Karayachya Goshti
❤️ Rish mhaNto
Mumbai airport वर जाताना एक deep breath घे.
तू ready आहेस — IISER Pune ते Max Planck,
हे तू earn केलंस Bebu.

मी always इथे आहे. मला call कर केव्हाही. ❤️
— तुझा Rish 🧡
🗓️
Marburg मध्ये आलीस
पहिला आठवडा 🇩🇪
पहिला आठवडा सगळ्यात महत्त्वाचा आहे — घाबरू नकोस
🚨 Landing Nantarach — Pahile 3 Taas
✈️ Frankfurt Airport la utarlyavar lekh kar
1
Aldi Talk SIM card घे — terminal मध्ये मिळतो, right after customs ❤️
2
ICE train book कर Marburg साठी — DB Navigator app वर (approx 2 hours)
3
Flat la poh — rest ghe. Explore, shopping, sagala udya. Aaj fakaT rest.
4
Rish la call kar — mi wait kartoy ❤️
🏃 Priority Order (Sequence mahatvachi!)
⚠️ Ithe Chukta Nako
Important Warnings
🔴 Anmeldung ला 14 दिवसांची deadline आहे — miss करू नकोस
🔴 Sunday la sare shops band asataat — Saturday la stock up kar
🔴 Bus tikat validate (stamp) kar before boarding — inspector fine deto
🔴 N26 bank account: Anmeldung zalyanantarach apply kar
🔴 Health insurance (TK) — लगेच apply कर, mandatory आहे
🔴 NORA app install kar — Day 1 lach
❤️ Rish mhaNto
Ek ek goshta kar — sagalach ek veli karayachi nahi. Tu hushaar ahes. German system rules-based aahe — follow kelas ki sorted. Ani kahi problem zaala tar app madhe ya phone var mi ithe aahe. ❤️

Bebu, don't worry ❤️
मला माहित आहे — it happens. तुला सगळं नवीन वाटेल, आणि भीती पण वाटेल. पण don't worry — मी आहे ना.

घाबरून जाऊ नकोस. तुला सगळं जमणार आहे. बस निडरपणे स्वतःला express कर — जी तू आहेस, तीच रहा.

I know you are the best. ❤️ तू IISER मधून Max Planck ला पोहोचलीस — हे काही normal नाही. तू already winner आहेस.

जेव्हा पण scared वाटेल — हे card पुन्हा उघड. मी इथेच आहे. Always. 🧡
